title: [Goal] Inspector: fix for deployed environments
description:
## Description

The inspector currently reads source files via the Vite dev server middleware (/_storyboard/docs/source), which only works locally. On deployed/production builds, the file-reading middleware is not available — the inspector finds the component name but cannot display source code or line information.

Proposed solution: generate a build-time JSON API containing the contents of every file in the /src directory. When the inspector resolves a component to a filename, it fetches the file contents from this pre-built JSON index instead of the Vite middleware. This makes the inspector fully functional in deployed environments.

Key areas:
- packages/core/src/vite/docs-handler.js (current filesystem-based source endpoint)
- packages/core/src/InspectorPanel.svelte (client-side fetching logic)
- packages/core/src/vite/server-plugin.js (middleware routing)
- Build pipeline: generate static JSON for /src files at build time

## Tasks

- [x] **#g019#t01**: Build-time static JSON for inspector
  Added generateBundle hook to server plugin that emits _storyboard/inspector.json. Updated InspectorPanel.svelte to use static JSON in production.

---
